scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:server
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/server run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/server run lint
